op.text: [as of 2025-02-24] Training for Lakefront Marathon in October 2025; four runs per week plus long run every Saturday morning; ran eight miles on Saturday 2025-02-22; has training plan with gradual weekly mileage increase and cutback weeks every fourth week; casual runner for years with 5Ks and one half marathon about four years prior
On 2025-02-24, said of marathon training: 'It's the first time since mom that I've been excited about something in the future instead of dreading it' (2025-02-24)
